zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich於大約1045年出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也時，他的父親Gilbert de Maminot29歲，母親Mrs Gilbert de Mominot30歲。他於1084年與Emma Peverel在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年在英國肯特韋斯特 格林維其享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich于大约1045年出生在法国諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也时，他的父亲Gilbert de Maminot29岁，母亲Mrs Gilbert de Mominot30岁。他于1084年与Emma Peverel在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年在英国肯特韋斯特 格林維其享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich was born about 1045, in Bayeux, Calvados, Normandy, France, his father, Gilbert de Maminot, was 29 and his mother, Mrs Gilbert de Mominot, was 30. He married Emma Peverel in 1084, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1129, in West Greenwich, Kent, England, at the age of 85.

Il a épousé Emma Peverel en 1084, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1129, à West Greenwich, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich родился около 1045 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Maminot было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Gilbert de Mominot, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Peverel в 1084 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1129 г. в местности вест гринвич, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 85 лет.
